subcodes.first_line: O ye two servants who have drawn nigh unto the court of divine grandeur! Your letter was perused, and the sweet fragrances of the love of God wafted from its garden of inner meanings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو بنده مقرب درگاه کبریا مکتوب ملاحظه گردید نفحات محبت الله از گلشن معانی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @wisdom [hikmat]
